line: - Fixed scope leak fallback classification in `crates/saw-core/src/classifier.rs`

items: Fixed scope leak fallback classification in `crates/saw-core/src/classifier.rs`

line: - Robot mode emits a dedicated `{"event":"alert",...}` payload for alerts, not the normal status payload shape.

items: Robot mode emits a dedicated `{"event":"alert",...}` payload for alerts, not the normal status payload shape.

line: - The classifier fallback was over-eager: recent in-guard write tool calls were being treated as scope leaks because it fell back to the first guard even when `matching_guard_path(...)` returned `None`.

items: The classifier fallback was over-eager: recent in-guard write tool calls were being treated as scope leaks because it fell back to the first guard even when `matching_guard_path(...)` returned `None`.

line: - Implemented the e2e as a JSONL-fixture-driven test using `saw watch --file ... --robot` so it is deterministic and does not require a live Claude session.

items: Implemented the e2e as a JSONL-fixture-driven test using `saw watch --file ... --robot` so it is deterministic and does not require a live Claude session.

line: - Asserted the out-of-scope case against the robot alert payload message content and the in-scope case against absence of `SCOPE_LEAKING`.

items: Asserted the out-of-scope case against the robot alert payload message content and the in-scope case against absence of `SCOPE_LEAKING`.

line: - `cargo build` / `cargo test` still emit existing dead-code warnings in `src/cmd/common.rs` and `src/cmd/watch.rs`, but all tests pass.

items: `cargo build` / `cargo test` still emit existing dead-code warnings in `src/cmd/common.rs` and `src/cmd/watch.rs`, but all tests pass.
